# Moonight Protocol

> BTC-backed stablecoin protocol on Starknet. Mint moonUSD against Bitcoin collateral with delta-neutral vaults, yield strategies, and DeFi-native payment cards.

## Overview

Moonight Protocol is a decentralized finance (DeFi) protocol built on Starknet that enables users to mint moonUSD, a stablecoin backed by Bitcoin collateral (WBTC). The protocol uses Cairo smart contracts with STARK proofs for verifiable computation and offers privacy features powered by S-two technology.

## Core Products

### moonUSD Stablecoin
- BTC-backed stablecoin minted via collateralized debt positions (CDPs)
- Over-collateralized: minimum 125% collateral ratio (80% LTV)
- User-set interest rates with market-driven equilibrium
- Redeemable for underlying BTC collateral at face value

### Delta-Neutral Vaults
- **Vault A (Conservative)**: Low-risk BTC yield via basis trade strategies. Target 4-8% APY.
- **Vault C (Aggressive)**: Higher-risk BTC yield via options and derivatives. Target 15-30% APY.
- Auto-compounding with Starknet-native execution.

### DeFi Payment Card
- Spend moonUSD at point-of-sale via virtual/physical debit cards
- Real-time settlement from on-chain balance
- Integrated with Starknet for low-cost transactions

### Privacy Mode
- Enhanced transaction privacy powered by S-two zero-knowledge proofs
- Optional privacy shielding for transfers and vault operations
- zkKYC compliance without revealing personal data

## Technical Architecture

### Smart Contracts (Cairo 2.9.2 on Starknet)
- **CDPManager**: Opens/closes collateralized debt positions, manages collateral, accrues interest
- **MoonUSD**: ERC-20 stablecoin token with mint/burn access control
- **PositionNFT**: ERC-721 representing CDP ownership (transferable positions)
- **PriceOracle**: Pragma-based BTC/USD price feed with TWAP and staleness checks
- **StabilityPool**: Liquity-style liquidation absorption with O(1) accounting
- **RedemptionManager**: Sorted trove queue for moonUSD-to-BTC redemptions
- **ProtocolConfig**: Global parameters (fees, ratios, caps)

### Collateral Tiers
- **Tier 1 (strkBTC)**: 90% max LTV, 5% liquidation penalty — coming soon
- **Tier 2 (sBTC)**: 87% max LTV, 7.5% penalty — coming soon
- **Tier 3 (WBTC)**: 80% max LTV, 10% penalty — live on Sepolia

### Network
- **Testnet**: Starknet Sepolia (live, functional)
- **Mainnet**: Starknet mainnet (planned)

## Links

- Website: https://moonight.fun
- App (Mainnet): https://app.moonight.fun
- App (Testnet): https://sepolia.moonight.fun
- Twitter: https://x.com/moonaborz

## Key Terms

- **moonUSD**: The protocol's native stablecoin, pegged to $1 USD
- **CDP**: Collateralized Debt Position — a smart contract vault where users lock BTC to mint moonUSD
- **LTV**: Loan-to-Value ratio — maximum borrowing power relative to collateral value
- **Health Factor**: Ratio indicating position safety; liquidation occurs when HF <= 1.0
- **Stability Pool**: Pool of moonUSD depositors who absorb liquidated debt in exchange for discounted collateral
- **STARK proofs**: Zero-knowledge proofs used by Starknet for scalable, verifiable computation
- **S-two**: Privacy layer providing shielded transactions and zkKYC on Starknet
